title: melica caerulea
intro: Melica caerulea, also known as blue melic grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Melica caerulea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infuser, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
